sections.paragraph:
- Original: συλάω

- Transliteration: Sulao

- Phonetic: soo-lah'-o

- Definition:

1. to rob, despoil

- Origin: from a derivative of sullo (to strip, probably akin to G138, cf G4661)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a derivative of σύλλω sullō̄ (to strip; probably akin to G138; compare G4661); to despoil: - rob.
